# Full Circle Orthopedics and Sports Medicine

> Full Circle Orthopedics and Sports Medicine is a non-surgical orthopedic and sports medicine practice in Phoenix, Arizona, led by Courtney Kelm, PA-C. The practice specializes in regenerative orthopedics (PRP, A2M, mVASC, focused shockwave therapy, EMTT) to help athletes and active adults recover from injuries without surgery or steroids.

## Practice Information
- [About Us](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/about-us/): Practice history, mission, and provider team bios.
- [Services](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/services/): Full list of non-surgical treatments offered.
- [How It Works](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/how-it-works/): Overview of the patient evaluation and treatment process.
- [FAQ](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/faq/): Common patient questions about regenerative orthopedics and treatment options.

## Treatments
- [Comprehensive Evaluation](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/services/consultation/)
- [Shockwave Therapy](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/services/shockwave-therapy/)
- [EMTT Therapy](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/services/emtt-therapy/)
- [Platelet Rich Plasma (PRP)](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/services/platelet-rich-plasma-prp-injections/)
- [Alpha 2 Macroglobulin (PRP with A2M)](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/services/alpha-2-macroglobulin/)
- [Hyaluronic Acid (HA) Gel Injections](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/services/gel-injections/)
- [Steroid ("Cortisone") Injection](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/services/anti-inflamatory-injections/)
- [Trigger Point Injections](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/services/trigger-point-injections/)

- [Blog](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/blog/): Educational articles on regenerative orthopedics, shockwave therapy, and non-surgical treatment options.
- [Videos](https://fullcircleorthopedics.com/videos/): Educational video library.
